title: Record pblock18/9, maxRecent 8%, and 6-line thinking glance

fixtureActions.content:
# Pblock18 MaxRecent8 Thinking6 Contract

## Pblock 18
parallel compaction block threshold defaults to 18k with a 9k target so large histories summarize in denser chunks

## MaxRecent 8
full compaction keeps at most 2 recent messages and 8% recent size so long sessions reclaim denser working memory

## Thinking 6
live thinking shows a 6-line tail glance so agent work stays transparent without expand

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy/thinking vitest
